# Cala di Forno Talamone

> Apartment in the Maremma Natural Park, 50 metres from the sea. Direct booking, no intermediaries. Part of the No Tuscany network.

## Property

- [Home](https://talamone.notuscany.com/): Overview, availability calendar, direct booking
- [Apartment details](https://talamone.notuscany.com/appartamenti/cala): Full description, amenities, photos

## About

Cala di Forno is a 100 sqm apartment in Talamone, inside the Parco Naturale della Maremma (Maremma Natural Park), Tuscany, Italy. It sleeps up to 4 guests (1 double bed + sofa bed). Private garden, outdoor solar shower, fully equipped kitchen, 2 bathrooms, washing machine, dishwasher.

Direct booking available at talamone.notuscany.com. No OTA commissions.

## Contact

- Email: info@notuscany.com
- Website: https://talamone.notuscany.com
- Network: https://notuscany.com
